'''yongaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uteroperitoneal|uteroperitoneal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uteroperitoneal|uteroperitoneal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yongaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || yongarithi || yongariji || yongarishi || yongariki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || yongaruthu || yongaruju || yongarushu || yongaruku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || yongaruthu || yongaruju || yongarushu || yongaruku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || yongarufthuf || yongarufjuf || yongarufshuf || yongarufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || yongarethe || yongareje || yongareshe || yongareke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || yongarotho || yongarojo || yongarosho || yongaroko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || yongarotho || yongarojo || yongarosho || yongaroko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || yongarofthof || yongarofjof || yongarofshof || yongarofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yongarïfthïf || yongarïfjïf || yongarïfshïf || yongarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yongarïfthïf || yongarïfjïf || yongarïfshïf || yongarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yongarïfthïf || yongarïfjïf || yongarïfshïf || yongarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yongarïfthïf || yongarïfjïf || yongarïfshïf || yongarïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || yongaræthæ || yongaræjæ || yongaræshæ || yongarækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || yongaratha || yongaraja || yongarasha || yongaraka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || yongaratha || yongaraja || yongarasha || yongaraka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || yongarafthaf || yongarafjaf || yongarafshaf || yongarafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || yongarasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || yongarshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || yongarroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || yongarmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || yongaryaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyongarnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyongarnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyongarnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyongarnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || yongangarasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || yongangarshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || yongangarroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || yongangarmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || yongangaryaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyongangarnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyongangarnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyongangarnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyongangarnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || yengærasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || yengærshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || yengærroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || yengærmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || yengæryaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyengærnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyengærnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyengærnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyengærnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || yongfarasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || yongfarshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || yongfarroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || yongfarmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || yongfaryaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyongfarnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyongfarnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyongfarnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyongfarnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
